educational_programs_title: Programs built for measurable academic growth
educational_programs_description: Published courses from the admin panel appear here automatically with schedules, instructors and enrollment status.
offline_mode: Offline mode: showing cached pages and saved data where available.
academic_standards_description: A web control center that compares Nokta Academy with modern academic platforms: SIS records, attendance, gradebook, family portal, reports, finance, security, curriculum and multilingual communication.
academic_standards_metrics_failed: Live metrics could not be loaded. The standards map is still available, but readiness scores may be lower than actual.
standard_records_benchmark: Central student, staff, class, branch and family records with one reliable source of truth.
standard_attendance_benchmark: Daily attendance capture, trend visibility, guardian awareness and missing-record follow-up.
standard_gradebook_benchmark: Assessment records, exam planning, result publishing and transcript-ready academic history.
standard_portal_benchmark: Transparent access to attendance, grades, payments, announcements and academic progress.
standard_analytics_benchmark: Live dashboards, trend analysis, audit-ready reports and KPI monitoring for leaders.
standard_finance_benchmark: Payments, expenses, outstanding balances and branch-level operational finance visibility.
standard_security_benchmark: Role-based access, audit history, permission discipline and production security readiness.
standard_curriculum_benchmark: Course catalog, curriculum plans, outcomes, resources and learning progression management.
standard_communication_benchmark: Announcements, preferred-language readiness, offline continuity and role-aware messaging.
academic_standards_roadmap_1: Create admission pipeline stages and document-upload tracking.
academic_standards_roadmap_2: Add automated absence thresholds with parent notifications.
academic_standards_roadmap_3: Introduce weighted grade categories, GPA logic and report-card export.
academic_standards_roadmap_4: Add behavior and student support records for intervention tracking.
academic_standards_roadmap_5: Add data-quality checks for missing guardian, class, teacher and fee fields.
academic_standards_roadmap_6: Connect dashboards to role-specific weekly operational tasks.
timetable_description: Class schedule with teacher, subject, room, delivery mode and online link.
